feed.title: Steam
feed.subtitle: Combined Steam news feed: the global Steam news feed plus selected games and groups, from Steam's native news RSS.

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 2's co-lead designer was asked to make Baldur's Gate 4 after Larian declined: 'Having to compete against Baldur's Gate 3? That would be insanity'
entry.content: fter the stratospheric success of Baldur's Gate 3 , Hasbro was naturally keen for a follow-up. The only problem? Larian wasn't interested in doing Baldur's Gate 4. And it turns out the second person Hasbro asked didn't want the job either... Read more.

entry.title: I wasn't convinced Cyberpunk: Edgerunners could have a sadder ending until I read its writer's other pitches—and boy did we get off easy
entry.content: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners is an excellent anime, and it's also very sad—its ending does a great job of reaching into your chest, busting past your ribs, grabbing your heart and ripping it out. It's a genuinely thoughtful examination of the cyberpunk genre's dystopia, the corrupt ideas of success and legacy we can get in a society that views people as disposable... Read more.

entry.title: Sony games boss says company will bravely keep sending live services over the top, despite cancelling 8 of the 12 ones planned for 2025 and wiping out most of Destiny 2's developers
entry.content: Sony had a rough track record last year. As one of our contributors Rick Lane pointed out, the company had cancelled eight out of 12 live service games that were originally planned for 2025, including the trainwreck that was Concord —fast-forward to 2026, and it's called curtains on Destiny 2 , a game just years prior I would've considered one of the most successful live service games on the market... Read more.

entry.title: The original version of Dead or Alive 6 was delisted in favor of a rerelease that's currently at 70% negative reviews on Steam: 'Tecmo just sees this as the coomer franchise'
entry.content: Back when the GTA Trilogy trainwreck happened, Dominic Tarason wrote a piece for us making the case that old games shouldn't be delisted when they're rereleased . It hasn't stopped happening, of course, and most recently Dead or Alive 6 was removed from sale in favor of Dead or Alive 6 Last Round, a rerelease so underwhelming it's currently got a 70% negative user rating on Steam. For comparison, the original version is currently 70% positive, and that's after players started giving it negative

entry.title: After a 4-year wait, Netflix announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming this fall
entry.content: s reported by Polygon , we now have a release window for the second season of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners. We'll finally see more episodes of the explosively popular anime adaptation of Mike Pondsmith's tabletop setting and CD Projekt's 2020 RPG sometime this fall ... Read more.

entry.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says Obsidian has 'Karma Police' who go through games making sure every skill gets enough cool stuff to do: 'We're not gonna leave you out to dry'
entry.content: In a recent appearance on the Human Can Opener podcast , Obsidian design director Josh Sawyer talked about how the studio approached balance in Fallout: New Vegas, particularly with skill checks in dialogue and making sure different character builds got unique, cool reactivity throughout the game... Read more.

entry.title: Josh Sawyer says the Fallout TV show is an 'amazing adaptation' of a videogame, and 'one of the best that I've seen'
entry.content: There's one thing all videogame adaptations in film and TV have in common: they stink. Or at least, that's how it felt for a long time—personally, I stopped adding the caveat 'good for a videogame adaptation' after I watched the Fallout show and learned these things didn't have to be somewhere between middling and godawful. But what do Fallout's designers and developers think of the show?.. Read more.

entry.title: Nightdive says compatibility with fan missions was a big priority for Thief Remastered, and there's one massive mod in particular it knew it had to get working
entry.content: Thief: The Dark Project is a brilliant game for many reasons, among which is that it has one of the best mapping communities of any game. While the Doom and Quake mapping scenes are larger and more prolific, Thief's mappers consistently punch so far above their weight they should probably get into boxing sims rather than stealth games. They regularly deliver maps, missions and entire campaigns that are orders of magnitude more ambitious than what exists in the base game... Read more.

entry.title: To get Thief Remastered's cutscenes right, Nightdive brought on the dev behind the 1998 originals
entry.content: In a new episode of Nightdive's Deep Dive podcast , host Locke Vincent, producer Daniel Grayshon, and studio head Stephen Kick got into some of the more granular details of Thief: The Dark Project Remastered, including that they brought on an original Looking Glass artist, Daniel Thron, to help revamp Thief's cutscenes... Read more.

entry.title: Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead
entry.content: Palworld just keeps moving. It's postured to more or less shrug off its prominent legal battle with Nintendo , and it's reaching that glorious threshold any survival-craft game hopes to eventually cross: actually being done. Or if not done, complete enough to call it version 1.0 when it finally releases July 10... Read more.

entry.title: Riot delays 'last hit indicators' in League of Legends ranked mode after fan response: 'We want to get more data and feedback'
entry.content: Once you've lost a few thousand hours to a MOBA, it's easy to forget how hard it was to learn. A game like League of Legends has well over a hundred playable characters, all sorts of items and jungle monsters, and even the basics can be fussy. One of the most crucial is the zen practice of "last hitting," or swinging at a hostile creep right as it's about to die to get credit and gold for the kill... Read more.

entry.title: Web port wizards produce browser versions of Half-Life 2 and Portal
entry.content: It's been established that Doom can run on produce , but porting wizardry doesn't start and end with blasting cacodemons on increasingly ludicrous hardware setups. It's sometimes the simple things that stick out most, like this web browser port of Half-Life 2 . Not as silly as potatoes, but impressive all the same... Read more.

entry.title: A series of surprise updates has polished Path of Exile 2 into a juggernaut that's about to shake up the action RPG genre later this year
entry.content: Grinding Gear Games is on a roll. Despite announcing that the most recent expansion to Path of Exile 2 would be its last update before it leaves early access later this year, the patches keep coming... Read more.

entry.title: Riot teases League of Legends Classic, with a full reveal coming in two weeks
entry.content: fter a bunch of decidedly low-poly character models started leaking from League of Legends's public test servers, Riot decided to pull the ripcord: League of Legends Classic is real, though when exactly it will harken back to is yet to be seen... Read more.

entry.title: Not content with a Nightdive remaster, Thief's also getting a graphic novel and an original soundtrack featuring Garrett's voice actor
entry.content: In one of the rarest phrases ever uttered, it's a pretty good time to be a Thief fan right now. Earlier this month, Thief: The Dark Project Remastered was announced at The PC Gaming Show , with the remaster maestros at Nightdive Studios lending their skills to Looking Glass' revolutionary stealth game. entry.title: Known Issue [Mac]
entry.content: Some Mac users have experienced issues opening their Saved games for a few hours between June 25 and June 26. If you were affected, this issue can be fixed and your saves restored by deleting this folder: ~/Library/Application Support/Paralives/Paralives/

entry.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer has a lot more Slay the Spire DNA than I expected, because its ex-Burnout devs wanted to add 'real consequence' to each race
entry.content: Don't call Galactic Racer "Podracer" in front of its developers—they'll politely point out that their new game is about multiple types of racing in the Star Wars universe, and it is not a sequel to 1999's Episode 1 Racer, despite featuring podracing's most iconic characters and courses. At first this feels like splitting hairs to mollify the strict branding watchdogs of the Walt Disney Corporation, but play a few minutes of the new racer and the distinction starts to make more sense... Read more

entry.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says the NCR and Caesar's Legion feel so real because their members disagree and challenge each other: 'You have to wrestle with the fact that it contains multitudes'
entry.content: Fallout: New Vegas is an incredible game, and its factions are its best part. The New California Republic (NCR), Caesar's Legion, and the Securitrons of Mr House are omnipresent in the Mojave, and there's barely an NPC in the game that doesn't shine light on some new aspect of each one... Read more.

entry.title: An in-game survey is available
entry.content: A new in-game survey is available for players, focused on the Hideout and its role in character progression. We would like to hear your opinion on module upgrades, construction times, usefulness, and possible new features for the Hideout. Your responses will help us improve existing mechanics and determine priorities for future changes. As a reward for participating in the survey, you will receive an item via in-game mail.

entry.title: A Decal Trophy for British Armed Forces Day!
entry.content: The first Victoria Cross ceremony took place on June 26th 1857. In 2009, the last Saturday in June was designated British Armed Forces Day. The British Army distinguished itself most prominently during the Second World War, when following the surrender of France, Britain and the Commonwealth remained Germany’s only adversaries for a full year. After the Second World War, Britain primarily fought as part of coalition forces, but the Falklands War vividly demonstrated its military effectiveness. O

entry.title: G-Fusion Game Festival 2026 Shenzhen
entry.content: About G-Fusion: G-Fusion Game Festival is one of the biggest gamer-oriented video game events in China. It is run by the Chinese video game media - GCORES. G-Fusion began as a gamer meet up event and gradually grew into a large-scale, professional video game festival. But no matter how big it has become, G-Fusion still keeps its focus on the gamers' experiences. Audiences will be able to enjoy all kinds of games ranging from indie titles, AAA titles to even tabletop games from all over the world

entry.title: Nightdive's Thief remaster is adding a weapon wheel and other UI changes, 'but we're not forcing you to use it'
entry.content: Partway through Nightdive's video about remastering Thief: The Dark Project, producer Daniel Grayshon casually mentions that in the original you pressed 4 to bring up the water arrows and I realized I still remember a bunch of the keybinds for Thief's arsenal of items. The trusty blackjack was 2, rope arrows were 8, the get-out-of-jail-free flash bomb on F6, and so on... Read more.

entry.title: Deltarune Chapter 5 launches to nearly 300,000 concurrent players on Steam, Chapter 6 is coming in 2027
entry.content: The long-awaited fifth chapter of Deltarune hit Steam like an asteroid yesterday, sending its concurrent player count skyrocketing to nearly 300,000 —more than double its previous peak player count—and putting the game amidst the platform's top 10 best-selling games. Despite its age and somewhat irregular release schedule, interest in the game clearly remains high. And for those many of you who are interested in it, the good news is that more is on the way... Read more.

entry.title: I've played countless Doom engine games, so believe me when I say this one that combines the FPS with JRPG combat might be the coolest one in 30 years
entry.content: I know my Doom , and its many derivatives . I've been covering it for years . It has almost never left my PC in over three decades, so I do not say this lightly. End of Starchild —a completely free, standalone game from prolific musician and indie dev Em Essex—might be the single coolest thing built on Doom's venerable, time-tested foundations... Read more.

entry.title: You can finally turn Riot's Vanguard anti-cheat off when you're not playing a game

entry.title: Path of Exile 2 Build Guides on the Website
entry.content: You no longer need to download build files! We've implemented a new feature that allows you to subscribe to build guides on the website and receive all updates automatically in the game on both PC and Consoles. If you want to upload your own builds, click here !

entry.title: One of the best ways to play Morrowind just got better with improved scripting support for magic mods and a host of crash fixes
entry.content: Morrowind, the gloomiest and mushroomiest of all the Elder Scrolls games, is getting on in years—and it was never the most polished game in town, even upon its release a whopping 24 years ago. If you're sick of those rough edges, you need look no further than OpenMW, a fanmade open-source engine which makes the game play nice with modern hardware and operating systems. If that sounds like your thing, you'll be pleased to know it just got a huge update ... Read more.

entry.title: FREE STUFF - Summer Event!
entry.content: GET YOUR FREE TOKEN NOW! 1. Defeat any monster, and you'll be credited with +1 Pet-Bonus Token. Getting multiple of these token doesn't do anything btw. 2. Find a player with the pet bonus you want most. This can be ANY pet, including Bundle exclusive pets! 3. Double-click said player, and click "Trade". You do NOT need a pet to do this, you'll find the "Use" button once this Trade Window is up. Do not "trade" your pet itself, that is a separate system... 4. Enjoy your new bonus, forever! Note t

entry.title: Bryce Clark, game director of Poppy Playtime, has played 23,000 hours of Steam games: 'I'm a bit obsessed with learning the market'
entry.content: Bryce Clark, game director on Poppy Playtime, grew up playing DOS games on his family PC. His favourite childhood game was the 1994 fantasy RTS Dominus , which had unfortunate ramifications for his father. "It was nearly impossible to get working," Clark recalls. "My poor dad ended up spending so many hours on the hard line trying to call tech support. 'Why is this videogame not working for my son?' It was a lot about troubleshooting way back.".. Read more.

entry.title: CD Projekt Red boss believes some fans were forever burned by Cyberpunk 2077's disastrous launch: 'I'm convinced that we lost the faith of some people indefinitely'
entry.content: The infamous launch of Cyberpunk 2077 was a low point in CD Projekt Red's history. With hype levels at critical mass, the RPG released in a buggy, unoptimised, and downright unfinished state that was so bad the PS4 version of the game was pulled from the PlayStation store . The company's share price tanked, investors filed a class action lawsuit, and CDPR's reputation was left in tatters... Read more.

entry.title: The IEM Cologne 2026 Grand Finals
entry.content: Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship. After losing the opening map of their Playoffs, FURIA have been unbeaten, rallying back against 9z Team to win 2-1 in the Quarterfinals and taking down Aurora Gaming 2-0 in the Semifinals to reach the Grand Finals for the first time in the organization's history. Team Falcons took down the world's #1 team, Team Vitality, 2-1 in the Quarterfinals

entry.title: Stellaris celebrates 10 years (and a new DLC) with a free weekend and a 70% discount
entry.content: Stellaris is one of those games I've never played, but I'm delightfully confounded by it from afar, as occasionally one of my friends will send me a message about how her robotic gestalt consciousness is doing. And here I was thinking this was about annexing provinces, or whatever! If you'd like to be confounded up close, now seems like an ideal time—the game is free to play this weekend on Steam ... Read more.

entry.title: Soul of Anatolia: Meet the Team
entry.content: Today, we’re excited to introduce the team behind the upcoming Soul of Anatolia map expansion for Euro Truck Simulator 2 . This upcoming DLC will take drivers on a journey through one of Türkiye’s most diverse and captivating regions, featuring a rich blend of landscapes, historic cities, cultural landmarks, and scenic roads waiting to be explored. In this edition of Meet the Team, we’d like to give you a closer look at some of the people working on the project. They have prepared a few words ab

entry.title: This GTA 5 filmmaker is livestreaming every step of machinima production, from location scouting to live debugging when the game inevitably crashes
entry.content: I've spent an inordinate amount of my life watching Grand Theft Auto machinima over the last decade. And while I can certainly appreciate the amount of editing and effort that goes into each video's production—I don't always think of that toil when gawping at the finished article. According to filmmaker Jordy Veenstra , however, that polished end result only tells half the story... Read more.

entry.title: Path of Exile 2 director says players exploiting system to become in-game millionaires 'ruined Christmas for me' and joked that he's 'lost all sympathy' for everyone who took advantage of it
entry.content: Path of Exile 2's player trading economy crumbled in its last season the moment word got out about a clever technique that would net you so much loot you could become an in-game millionaire in a few days. It was so catastrophic that developer Grinding Gear Games had to interrupt its holiday break to fix it... Read more.
